articles.title: Connelly Early continues to shine for Red Sox after strong first start in 2026
articles.description:
"He felt strong. He was strong all spring. … He did enough to give us a chance to win."

The post Connelly Early continues to shine for Red Sox after strong first start in 2026  appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Connelly Early had a strong first start for the Red Sox on March 29, 2026.
Manager Alex Cora praised Early's performance, stating he gave the team a chance to win.
Early's success boosts local fan optimism for the Red Sox's 2026 season.

articles.title: Boston Fleet cinch berth in Walter Cup Playoffs with win over Minnesota Frost
articles.description:
The Boston Fleet clinched a spot in the Walter Cup Playoffs with six games left on the regular-season slate.

The post Boston Fleet cinch berth in Walter Cup Playoffs with win over Minnesota Frost appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Boston Fleet secured a playoff spot in the Walter Cup with a recent victory.
The team has six regular-season games remaining before the playoffs begin.
This achievement boosts local support and excitement for women's hockey in Boston.

articles.title: Viktor Arvidsson’s goal in shootout completes Bruins’ rally for 4-3 victory over Blue Jackets
articles.description:
It is the ninth time in franchise history the Bruins have posted a three-goal, third-period comeback.

The post Viktor Arvidsson’s goal in shootout completes Bruins’ rally for 4-3 victory over Blue Jackets appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Bruins rallied from a three-goal deficit to win 4-3 against Blue Jackets.
Viktor Arvidsson scored the decisive goal in the shootout on March 29.
This marks the ninth three-goal comeback in Bruins' franchise history.

articles.title: Woman charged in fatal South Boston stabbing
articles.description:
Gisselle Pascual, 24, faces manslaughter and assault charges, police said.

The post Woman charged in fatal South Boston stabbing appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Gisselle Pascual, 24, charged with manslaughter in South Boston stabbing incident.
Incident resulted in one fatality, raising safety concerns in the community.
Pascual's arraignment scheduled for April 2026, impacting local law enforcement resources.

articles.title: Brockton police shoot man who allegedly fired at officers, man sleeping nearby also injured, DA says
articles.description:
Both the driver shot in the shoulder by police and the 71-year-old grazed by a bullet were transported to the hospital with non-life threatening injuries, the DA said.

The post Brockton police shoot man who allegedly fired at officers, man sleeping nearby also injured, DA says appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Brockton police shot a man who allegedly fired at officers during an incident.
A 71-year-old man nearby was grazed by a bullet and hospitalized.
Both individuals sustained non-life threatening injuries, raising concerns about public safety.

articles.title: Former Bruins coach Bruce Cassidy abruptly fired by Vegas before playoffs
articles.description:
Bruce Cassidy helped lead Vegas to a Stanley Cup just a year after being fired by the Bruins.

The post Former Bruins coach Bruce Cassidy abruptly fired by Vegas before playoffs appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Bruce Cassidy was fired by the Vegas Golden Knights on March 29, 2026.
Cassidy led Vegas to a Stanley Cup win just a year after leaving the Bruins.
His firing raises questions about coaching stability for Boston fans and former players.

articles.title: New NFL mock draft has Patriots addressing major need on defense with 31st pick
articles.description:
T.J. Parker recorded 21.5 sacks over three seasons at Clemson.

The post New NFL mock draft has Patriots addressing major need on defense with 31st pick appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Patriots plan to use 31st pick in NFL draft to strengthen defense.
Clemson's T.J. Parker, with 21.5 sacks, is a top prospect for the team.
Strengthening defense could enhance Patriots' performance in upcoming season for Boston fans.
